mapper.sql: id, scene, agent_role, primary_model_profile_id, fallback_model_profile_id, route_label, enabled, remarks, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: insert into agent_model_bindings ( scene, agent_role, primary_model_profile_id, fallback_model_profile_id, route_label, enabled, remarks, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{binding.scene}, #{binding.agentRole}, #{binding.primaryModelProfileId}, #{binding.fallbackModelProfileId}, #{binding.routeLabel}, #{binding.enabled}, #{binding.remarks}, #{binding.createdBy}, #{binding.updatedBy} ) returning id
mapper.update: update agent_model_bindings set scene = #{binding.scene}, agent_role = #{binding.agentRole}, primary_model_profile_id = #{binding.primaryModelProfileId}, fallback_model_profile_id = #{binding.fallbackModelProfileId}, route_label = #{binding.routeLabel}, enabled = #{binding.enabled}, remarks = #{binding.remarks}, updated_by = #{binding.updatedBy}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{binding.id}
mapper.select: select from agent_model_bindings order by scene asc, agent_role asc
select from agent_model_bindings where scene = #{scene} and enabled = true order by agent_role asc
